description: Domain invariant declarations for TutorPutor product

invariants.name: Learning session state machine
invariants.description: Learning sessions must follow valid state transitions (created -> active -> paused -> completed)

invariants.name: Student progress tracking
invariants.description: Student progress must be accurately tracked and persisted

invariants.name: Session audit trail
invariants.description: All learning session activities must be logged with student, timestamp, and action

invariants.name: Student data privacy
invariants.description: Student data must be protected with encryption and access controls

invariants.name: Student authorization
invariants.description: Students must be authenticated and authorized for session access

invariants.name: Tenant student isolation
invariants.description: Student data must be isolated by tenant with no cross-tenant access

invariants.name: Content delivery integrity
invariants.description: Learning content must be delivered without corruption or modification
